title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 23 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 23 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 23 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/06/2022
DCE iron ore was was shocked and continued upward all the day.The main contract closed at 749.5,decreased of 2.46%. Traders are not veryenthusiastic about shipments, steel mills are mainly on the sidelines, and there are few transactions in the market.PBF at Shandong port dealt 770-800yuan/mt,increased 10 yuan/mt than yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 785-795 yuan/mt.
